headline: Cell Structure
description: Cells are the basic unit of life. Prokaryotes (bacteria, archaea): no nucleus, simple. Eukaryotes (animals, plants, fungi): nucleus, membrane-bound organelles. Key organelles: nucleus (DNA), mitochondria (energy, ATP), endoplasmic reticulum (protein synthesis), Golgi apparatus (protein packaging), lysosomes (digestion).
